boundary: Day-of closeout support only: this checklist does not satisfy goal completion, does not claim expert approval, does not claim a timed rehearsal was completed, and provides no award guarantee.

closeout_items.proof_required: current package tree and readiness report
closeout_items.expected_after_step: readiness gate reports pass 65/65 before external execution starts
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: a clean package preflight does not substitute for real expert feedback or real timed rehearsal evidence

closeout_items.proof_required: real expert feedback source attachment before archival
closeout_items.command: python scripts/preflight_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback
closeout_items.expected_after_step: preflight validates reviewer identity, role, date, dimensions, remediation, and source attachment without writing intake files
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: preflight returns status=pass and reports source_sha256 for the real feedback attachment
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: expert outreach, generated summaries, and metadata JSON do not substitute for the real feedback attachment

closeout_items.command: python scripts/record_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback
closeout_items.expected_after_step: hard_evidence_ledger expert_feedback collected_count reaches at least 1 after ledger rebuild
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: metadata has real_feedback_confirmed=true, source_origin=external_attachment, source_sha256, reviewer identity, dimensions, and remediation record
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: outreach proof alone does not substitute for received expert feedback

closeout_items.proof_required: real timed rehearsal timer or observer attachment before archival
closeout_items.command: python scripts/preflight_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py timed_rehearsal --id real-rehearsal-id --source path/to/real-timer-or-observer-file.txt --evidence-type observer_note --rehearsal-date YYYY-MM-DD --observer real-observer-alias --opening-actual-seconds 88 --demo-actual-seconds 170 --offline-fallback-actual-seconds 18 --killer-question-seconds 25 25 25 25 25 --confirm-real-rehearsal
closeout_items.expected_after_step: preflight validates observer, date, five killer-question timings, and source attachment without writing intake files
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: preflight returns status=pass and reports source_sha256 for the real timed rehearsal attachment
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: schedule proof or a generated note without independent source does not substitute for a real observed run

closeout_items.proof_required: real timed rehearsal timer or observer attachment
closeout_items.expected_after_step: hard_evidence_ledger timed_rehearsal collected_count reaches at least 1 only if timing acceptance passes
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: metadata has real_rehearsal_confirmed=true, source_origin=external_attachment, source_sha256, and timing_acceptance_pass=true
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: a scheduled rehearsal or over-limit rehearsal does not substitute for a passing timed rehearsal

closeout_items.proof_required: archived expert_feedback and timed_rehearsal intake files
closeout_items.expected_after_step: ledger shows both hard evidence categories collected and no rejected metadata blocks goal completion
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: manual edits to the ledger do not substitute for recorded source attachments and metadata

closeout_items.proof_required: updated hard evidence ledger and intake files
closeout_items.expected_after_step: package manifest, evidence hashes, command log, and archive include the new hard evidence files
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: package_manifest.json, evidence_hashes.json, and challenge_cup_submission_archive_manifest.json reference the new evidence
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: source files copied outside the package do not substitute for regenerated manifests and archive

closeout_items.expected_after_step: readiness gate passes after evidence refresh
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: a stale readiness report does not substitute for a rerun after evidence changes

closeout_items.expected_after_step: submission package verifier passes against the refreshed archive and hashes
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: verifier prints Status: pass and verifies hashed files
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: readiness pass alone does not substitute for archive/hash verification

closeout_items.proof_required: passing readiness report and completed hard_evidence_ledger
closeout_items.expected_after_step: goal completion gate is the only local authority for marking the objective complete
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: final audit, archive verification, or reviewer enthusiasm do not substitute for the goal completion gate

closeout_items.proof_required: latest goal completion report and refreshed package
closeout_items.expected_after_step: final audit reflects whether package review and goal completion are allowed
closeout_items.acceptance_signal: final_acceptance_audit.json preserves no award guarantee while reflecting the latest goal status
closeout_items.cannot_substitute: final audit cannot override a failing goal completion gate

integrity_rules: real expert feedback must come from a real reviewer source attachment
real timed rehearsal must come from a real timer or observer attachment
source_sha256 and source_origin=external_attachment are required for hard evidence closure
goal completion can pass only after both categories are archived and the goal gate passes
no award guarantee is made by this checklist or by any local gate
